files.content:
# Python-generated files
__pycache__/
*.py[oc]
build/
dist/
wheels/
*.egg-info

# Virtual environments
.venv
# Gaia inference outputs (regenerated by gaia infer)
.gaia/beliefs.json
.gaia/dep_beliefs/

[project]
name = "demo-gaia"
version = "0.1.0"
description = "Add your description here"
readme = "README.md"
authors = [
    { name = "<AUTHOR>", email = "<AUTHOR_EMAIL>" }
]
requires-python = ">=3.12"
dependencies = []

[build-system]
requires = ["uv_build>=0.11.3,<0.12.0"]
build-backend = "uv_build"

[tool.hatch.build.targets.wheel]
packages = ["src/demo"]

[tool.gaia]
type = "knowledge-package"
uuid = "<UUID4>"

from gaia.engine.lang import claim, derive, note

context = note("Background context for this package.")
hypothesis = claim("A scientific hypothesis.")
prediction = derive(
    "A testable prediction follows from the hypothesis.",
    given=hypothesis,
    background=[context],
    rationale="Explain why the hypothesis entails this prediction.",
)

__all__ = ["hypothesis", "prediction"]
